---
title: "Eliminate Branches by Melding IR Instructions"
date: 2026-06-29
year: 2026
pdf: "https://drops.dagstuhl.de/storage/00lipics/lipics-vol372-ecoop2026/LIPIcs.ECOOP.2026.18/LIPIcs.ECOOP.2026.18.pdf"
venue: "ECOOP 2026"
award: ""
code: "https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19598511"
slides: ""
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2512.22390"
video: ""
author:
  - name: Yuze Li
  - name: Srinivasan Ramachandra Sharma
  - name: Charitha Saumya
  - name: Ali R. Butt
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
